channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Name That Toon Contest
item.description: No summary available
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Ivanti, Fortinet, and SAP Release Patches for Multiple Critical Vulnerabilities
item.description:
Fortinet, Ivanti, and SAP have released security updates to address multiple critical security vulnerabilities that could result in arbitrary code execution and information disclosure.
The security f...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Power company in Japan fears data breach after losing storage drive containing customer details
item.description: Buranond Kijwatanachai reports: Private personal information of nearly 11 million people may have been leaked after a Kyushu power company lost a storage drive earlier this year. According to Asahi Sh...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Unpatched Langflow Flaw CVE-2026-5027 Exploited for Unauthenticated RCE

item.title: New FROST Attack Lets Websites Track What Sites and Apps You Open via SSD Timing
item.description: A malicious website can work out which sites you visit and which apps you open, using nothing but JavaScript and the timing of your SSD. The attack, called FROST, needs no native code, no extension, a...
